availability_zone_id.description: AZ identifier for locating the mount target

availability_zone_name.description: Readable name of the AZ hosting the mount target

dns_name.description: DNS address for accessing the EFS mount target

file_system_arn.description: ARN for identifying the linked EFS file system

id.description: Unique ID for the EFS mount target resource

mount_target_dns_name.description: Specific DNS name for the EFS mount target

network_interface_id.description: ID of the network interface attached to the mount target

owner_id.description: AWS account ID that owns the mount target
